title: Indie Semiconductor Q3 2025 Earnings Highlights
text: Indie Semiconductor reported Q3 2025 revenue of $53.7 million, aligned with guidance. Non-GAAP gross margin: 49.6%. Operating expenses: $37.9 million. Non-GAAP operating loss: $11.3 million. Net loss: $13.3 million ($0.07 per share). Cash reserves: $171.2 million (down $31.7M sequentially). Strategic backlog expanded to $7.4 billion (from $7.1 billion YoY), demonstrating strong future potential. Key wins included image signal processing for leading self-driving Robotaxi OEM in North America. Q4 2025 guidance: $54-60 million revenue, gross margins ~47%. Management expects revenue recovery once supply issues resolve by Q1 2026. Company expanding into quantum computing and humanoid robotics markets.
